request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are increasingly relying on us for their defense, while our own preparedness is lagging? A recent report shows that 68% of our partners expect us to take the lead in regional security, but only 32% of our own citizens feel we're adequately prepared. It's time to strengthen our commitments and ensure we're not left vulnerable. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
